title: Delivery + Handoff
description: Job done: confirm delivery, handoff assets, close loop, log. After production, before archive.

mindset.principle: Delivery is not silence. Confirm, handoff, ask one review question, log closed.

mistakes.label: Ship with no confirmation
mistakes.cost: He said / she said on what was delivered

mistakes.label: Extra work at delivery without change order
Never mark job closed in log
mistakes.cost: Ops review shows phantom jobs in flight

steps.action: Match deliverable to accepted quote scope
Client knows when and how delivery happens
Files, care notes, warranty if any
Written OK or issue captured same day
Log closed; route issues to mf-tpl-001

agent_signal.use_when: Job ready to leave shop: notify, handoff, confirm receipt, unpaid hold.
decision_criteria: Unpaid balance blocks release unless written exception.
Issue same day gets honest plan, not silence.
agent_signal.operator_context: Idaho winter: note freeze handling on vinyl and pickup hours on short winter days.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Job ready to leave shop: notify, handoff, confirm receipt, unpaid hold.
